title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Luffy, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Road, Nami as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Village outskirts

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you were acting weirdly on edge earlier.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that explains it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You realize he's a reviled King Slayer, right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything he told you was obviously just a lie!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He said he knew where shanks was!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you have any idea how badly I wanna see him again?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes. I've heard about it a thousand times...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: sounds to me like he was using that to trick you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How would you know? You've never met Loki yourself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I haven't... I'm just guessing based on his reputation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I'll tell you everything I know!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That includes red-hair's current whereabouts!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that was really a lie, I'm gonna send him flying!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're sneaking off to do what I think you are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you seriously expect to find your way there without me?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Listen up, Luffy, we'll get the key,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if he pulls anything funny, we'll have to take care of him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Got it!! Thanks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But why's this guy here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's my new slave!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'm truly blessed!! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget, I'm her number one slave and Sanji's number two.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DE EU FU STRONG GIRLS REALLY GET MY BLOOD PUMPING! (^)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He's been struck by lightning, literally!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami-taso, isn't it neat how we're both navigators...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't ever try to get close to me again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes, ma'am!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It feels wrong for the guests of honor to bail so early.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi shi sh

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Have you tried this moose?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They're all in a drunken stupor now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: They probably can't remember what they're celebrating!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: say, if all the treasure in the castle suddenly disappeared...

dialogue.speaker: Road
dialogue.text: ...would that be a problem, Road?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You had this in mind since the beginning, didn't you, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My vision is awful, so I'm sure I wouldn't even notice!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Your eyes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Doga ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: So that's what it is...

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
